perks.summary: orchestrate OSMO defect-image generation/augmentation/labeling; render the anomaly-infer defect_spec.jsonl (feeds remote train/deploy)
preflight the OSMO credential hf-token every DIG flow needs (and probe the gated Cosmos HF repos for scope when HF_TOKEN is exported)
verify the OSMO POD_TEMPLATE meets DIG requirements — nvoptix hostPath mount + /dev/shm >= 16 GiB
verify the DIG URL artifacts a given flow+usecase needs are present under DIG_URL_ROOT before a submit
derive the best anomalygen inference step from a checkpoint tree (argmax avg nn_score among validated steps with a saved iter_*.pt)
